institution.name: Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Guayama

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 26% at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Guayama vs the 2003–2007 baseline (1.7k vs 2.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Guayama fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Guayama rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 (62.1% → 82.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Guayama rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (38.7% → 44.2%).
